Hero.title: Find Your Next Property in Egypt.
Hero.description: Premium real estate marketing, rentals, sales, and developer projects in Egypt — built for buyers, owners, tenants, and developers.

RentPage.title: Discover Exceptional Rental Residences with Nexvia
RentPage.description: Explore a curated portfolio of premium residential, administrative, and commercial properties for rent across Egypt’s most prestigious destinations.
RentPage.featuredDescription: A handpicked selection of rental homes designed for comfort, location, and lifestyle.
RentPage.trustText: Every rental is reviewed to help you avoid wasted time and unreliable listings.
RentPage.fastText: Connect quickly with our team and get matched with suitable rental options.
RentPage.easyText: From search to viewing, Nexvia makes renting simpler and more transparent.
RentPage.ctaText: Tell us your preferred location, budget, and property type. We’ll help you find the right match.

BuyPage.title: Find Your Next Property Investment
BuyPage.description: Discover luxury apartments, villas, commercial spaces, and investment opportunities across Egypt’s top locations.
BuyPage.featuredDescription: Explore handpicked premium properties designed for modern living and smart investment opportunities.
BuyPage.trustText: We help you find verified properties with complete transparency and professional guidance.
BuyPage.fastText: From searching to closing the deal, we make the buying experience simple and efficient.
BuyPage.easyText: Whether you're buying your first home or investing, Nexvia makes ownership easier than ever.
BuyPage.ctaTitle: Own Your Next Property With Nexvia
BuyPage.ctaText: Connect with our team today and discover premium real estate opportunities tailored to your goals.

ListPropertyPage.title: List Your Property With Nexvia
ListPropertyPage.description: Share your property details with us and let Nexvia help you market it professionally to serious buyers and tenants.
ListPropertyPage.heroCardText: We help property owners present their units in a premium way and connect with serious leads.
ListPropertyPage.heroPointThree: Follow-up until the deal is closed
ListPropertyPage.formDescription: Fill in the basic details and our team will contact you to review the property and discuss the next steps.
ListPropertyPage.sideTrustText: We review property details carefully before presenting them to clients.
ListPropertyPage.sideFollowText: Our team follows up with you and interested clients throughout the journey.
ListPropertyPage.detailsPlaceholder: Tell us about the property, area, finishing, payment terms, or any important notes.
ListPropertyPage.formNote: This form is for UI preview only. Form submission will be connected later.
ListPropertyPage.whyTitle: Why List Your Property With Us?
ListPropertyPage.marketingText: We present your property with a modern, premium approach that attracts the right audience.
ListPropertyPage.buyersText: We focus on connecting your property with serious buyers and qualified tenants.
ListPropertyPage.closingText: We support communication and follow-up until the right deal is reached.
ListPropertyPage.ctaText: Submit your property details and let Nexvia help you reach the right clients.
